block_01: Is Apple stock about to plunge?
block_02: Cupertino geniuses will report Q2 earnings on May 1st after market close. Looks like Apple stock might take a hit from it.
block_04: Apple Inc. stock 5-year performance courtesy of
block_06: Historically speaking, second fiscal quarters have always been tough for Apple: that’s when their main competitor Samsung chooses to unveil their latest phone models. This time around, however, there are additional concerns.
block_07: Apple’s two main hardware suppliers significantly lowered their forecasts on revenue for Q2, signifying that perhaps iPhone sales aren’t going that well.
block_08: If the concerns prove valid and Apple reports poor financial results on May 1st their stock might take a serious dive.
block_10: *Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future results.
